Nice to meet you, Miss Rumford.
Hello. I was just getting bored, looking for someone to talk to.
Would you mind being that person?
Is something the matter?

With a beauty like this in front of me, no matter how glamorous or wonderful the place is, it all fades.
There's no point in worrying about the surroundings.
I wonder why people in visible professions shine so brightly.
The gaze that looks straight at me pierces my chest painfully.
Just standing there, that figure is already complete.
I can't believe such a beautiful woman would stab someone.
But then again, people can be deceiving. It's probably not good to be swayed by appearances.
Being beautiful can lead to sin all on its own.
I am
- Snipes. It's an honor to meet you tonight.
- Mr. Snipes? Ah.
Well, our initials are the same.
Oh, speaking of which,
we both have names that start with J.
It must be fate that we met today; nice to meet you.
How are you involved in this movie?
I just participated at the invitation of a friend.
Friend?
Yes, it's Guy Goldstein.
Oh, I see. I didn’t know that.
I was recognized as an actress because
of my role in
The Structure of Madness.
No, it was your heartfelt performance that was recognized.
I hope that's true.
I'm still nowhere near good enough. That role mostly focused on acting in bed.
That’s probably just in your head, or perhaps it’s a result of jealousy.
Do you really think so? I can't tell.
Since we have this opportunity, I would like to have a pleasant conversation.
I’ve come to understand that people’s words can sometimes turn into violence.
I heard from someone that you stabbed someone in the past. That might just be one of the bad rumors.
It's a terrible story, isn't it?
Fame tax can be quite costly, can't it? The thought of how long this lifestyle will continue makes me feel down.
It really brings me down.
It must be tough for you, but just try to not think about it right now.
Yeah, I get that.
Defamation, all sorts of rumors.
Just when I thought I was recognized as an actress, unpleasant things kept happening.
This party is,
I heard it's a tradition of the director. Apparently, it's something they always do right before cranking in.
Seems like it, yeah.
To be honest, I'm not really good at events like this.
You might find this surprising, but I'm not great in crowded places.
The director’s house is spacious. They have more than enough space for a party.
It seems like a room purpose-built for hosting parties.
Yeah, maybe it was designed with filming in mind too. It's wonderful.
I hope the director isn’t mad that I came late.
The movie has the title,
Major Leaguer.
but the main theme is love, not sports.
When it comes to love, there are many forms, right?
I've heard all types of love are depicted in this movie.
I'm playing a news anchor. I'm Guy's girlfriend.
G-Guy's girlfriend role!? That guy really hit the jackpot.
Hehe. But it seems like a pretty complicated couple, so I bet their interactions in the movie are mostly arguing.
I hope that with this role, I can finally shake off the label of a sex symbol.
Um, did our
do something rude?
Are you talking about that girl with the chestnut-brown hair? Was she your wife?
Wife? That’s a terrible misunderstanding. She acts like my assistant.
Ah, right, I remember you opened a detective office.
So it seems,
did get into business. Sorry, forget I said anything!
Isn't it fine? I’ll definitely rely on you when I'm in trouble, so I appreciate it.
Is she Japanese?
It seems her mother is Japanese.
I see.
Her delicate charm comes from her birth, doesn’t it? I envy her.
You don’t have to flatter me; your words will just inflate my ego and make me harder to handle.
Oh, but that's my true feeling.
Hehe.
I’m not worried about her business activities, really.
Sorry, today is my first time meeting her.
All I know is that she’s the only daughter of the director.
By the way, I feel like she’s misunderstanding something.
I hope the misunderstanding can be cleared up somehow.
Misunderstanding? What could it be?
No, maybe that's not something
I have to tell you.
I heard you're a straight-A student.
I don't really know Tonny Ford that well.
Is that so?
I'm curious why you're coming to today's party.
I'm not very familiar with it, so
I'm sorry.
Actually, I heard you're on Tonny's bad side. What happened?
Such a story could be
No way.
From the director?
I'll leave it to your imagination.
I can't think of any reason for someone to hold a grudge against me. But, there must be a reason why he speaks ill of me.
I don't want to talk about anything.
She's a bit difficult, you see.
Just talking to Cindy gets me in trouble.
It seems like I'm being targeted too.
In her case, she considers anyone approaching Cindy to be an enemy, you know. I wonder why that is.
I think she’s just really devoted to her work.
But that way, she ends up turning everyone into an enemy.
I’m actually close with Cindy. It’s a strange thing considering our age difference.
But age shouldn’t matter in such things.
Still, it does concern me a bit. Maybe to her, I’m like an older sister.
She’s a really nice girl, full of integrity and strength.
She should just go for it and aim to be a full-fledged actress.
Don’t you think she will?
But I wonder if Gloria will allow that.
I think that’s a difficult situation.
Cindy seems to have her share of struggles too.
Meryl is both a good senior and a rival. I’m really looking forward to our first collaboration.
You two are surprisingly close, huh?
Huh?!
No, I’d heard some not-so-great rumors.
Ugh, no matter how much I try to behave, bad rumors just stick around.
I don’t hold any bad feelings towards her, and we’re not on bad terms. Or do you suspect something?
It’s outrageous to think I’m suspicious.
I don’t know who told you what, but those are just baseless rumors.
I respect her.
I’m grateful she chose me.
You’re being modest.
No, I mean it.
It's an honor to be in the director's work.
The director is a wonderful person. I believe I can grow through this job.
I’m looking forward to it.
I really need to work hard.
There's so much to learn from the director.
I've heard about Guy's exploits.
Guy's a good guy, but he's quick with his hands, so be careful.
Oh, is that so? But with such a beautiful fiancé around...
Men can be troublesome, can't they?
I don't mix roles with my private life.
He was your fiancé, right?
Yes.
He seems very intelligent, and you can tell he's well-bred. I heard he comes from a privileged background, but it feels like we live in completely different worlds.
He must have been raised in a fortunate environment.
Do you know about the serial murder case?
Yes, I do. Since his movie role was that of a multiple personality murderer, I'm intrigued by incidents like that.
I see, I didn't know that.
I wonder what it's like to mutilate someone's body.
There were several cases targeting young girls in the past, but I've heard this time some body parts are missing.
Is that so?
Didn't you know? How is the culprit handling that?
That’s chilling.
Why do such incidents happen?
There are people who suspect you might be the culprit. Probably out of jealousy.
Since I played a role like that, people joke that I might be that way in real life.
You don’t get angry, huh? You seem to be listening as if it's someone else's problem.
I used to get angry.
But when there are too many instances, you just lose the energy to be angry.
I hope they catch the perpetrator soon.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
